_template_note: Seed for run_state.json, used by the MANUAL run-creation path (cp -r runs/_template runs/work/<run-name>): rename this file to run_state.json, fill in the FILL_IN_* placeholders, and delete all _*_note keys. If you used `apsf init-run`, a real run_state.json is created for you — just delete this copied seed. This file is intentionally NOT named run_state.json (see framework/SYNC_GOVERNANCE.md, 'Special case: run_state.json'). Canonical schema: src/apsf/core/state/run_state.py (RunState). Unknown _-prefixed fields are ignored by the parser (forward compatible).
run_id: FILL_IN_RUN_DIRECTORY_NAME (e.g. 2026-07-02-002_case-key_topic — must match the directory name exactly)
_run_type_note: heavy | light. Light runs use task.md instead of goal/plan (see framework/templates/run_light_template.md).
_current_phase_note: Initial phase for a fresh heavy run is GOAL_NEEDED (light run: TASK_NEEDED). Full phase list and valid transitions: src/apsf/core/state/transition_service.py — GOAL_NEEDED, SETUP_NEEDED, PLAN_NEEDED, IMPROVE_PLAN_OPTIONAL, BUILD_NEEDED, REVIEW_NEEDED, IMPROVE_NEEDED, VERIFY_OPTIONAL, RESULT_NEEDED, TRANSCRIPT_RECOMMENDED, COMPLETE.
_current_owner_note: Default owner per phase: GOAL_NEEDED=Human, PLAN_NEEDED=Planner, BUILD_NEEDED=Builder, REVIEW_NEEDED=Critic, IMPROVE_NEEDED=Human/Judge. Use "(none)" when closed.
